name: Almond-Orange Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture. Add the eggs, oil, almond extract, orange zest, and chopped almonds. Mix well until a dough forms.
5. Divide the dough into two equal portions. Shape each portion into 1-inch-high, 2 1/2-inch-wide, 8-inch-long flattened cylinders on the prepared cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until lightly browned on top. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
7. Cut the cooled biscotti logs into 3/4-inch slices. Arrange cut sides down on the baking sheet.
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the slices are lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool completely on wire racks.
